body:
Currently it's not possible to integrate Field with a range slider (2+ thumbs, the value is an array), there are distinct `<input>` elements for each thumb and they can't be given different `name`s (the one received via Field can't be overwritten by setting a different name with a ref or something)

This will only include the value of the last thumb in the form values:
```jsx
<Form
  onSubmit={async (event) => {
    event.preventDefault();
    const formData = new FormData(event.currentTarget);
    const formValue = Object.fromEntries(formData as any);
    console.log('submit', formValue);
  }}
>
  <Field.Root name="priceRange">
    <Slider.Root defaultValue={[33, 50]} format={FORMAT}>
      <Slider.Value />
      <Slider.Control>
        <Slider.Track>
          <Slider.Indicator />
          <Slider.Thumb/>
          <Slider.Thumb />
        </Slider.Track>
      </Slider.Control>
    </Slider.Root>
  </Field.Root>
  <button type="submit">Submit</button>
</Form>
```

Array values would also be needed for components like checkbox group, multi-select
title: [form][field] Improve support for array values
